page_content:
Required Core Course

ARHU230

ENGL395

Take four courses in at least three of the following ﬁve core areas. 2

Co-requirements: at least one of the above courses must have a Gen

Ed diversity designation

Total Credits

18

1 ENGL390H may also be used for this requirement.

2 For a list of courses approved for each area, follow this (https:// arhu.umd.edu/humanities-health-and-medicine-minor/) link. At least six of the nine credits must be taken at the 300- or 400-level. Students

Humanities, Health, and Medicine Minor

may satisfy up to 3 credits of the 12-credit core area through a credit- bearing internship experience related to the minor. The internship must be approved by the Humanities, Health, and Medicine minor advisor in order to have these 3 credits count toward their minor.
